ideation: This animation sequence will depict a rat cautiously sniffing the ground, using its front paws.  Since our robot doesn't have paws, we'll simulate this by having it lower its arms and then tilt its head slightly. Frame 1 will show the robot with its arms at its sides in a neutral position. Frame 2 shows both arms slightly lowered and moved forward, and the robot will slightly tilt its head downward. Frame 3 shows the arms extended further forward with the wrists slightly angled as if sniffing. Frame 4 will show the arms slightly retracting, and the head returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang low, neutral rat pose
arms lower and move forward, head dips slightly
arms extend, sniffing the ground cautiously
arms retract, head returns to neutral
